entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: The process of wearing away of topsoil by water or wind

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION STRUCTURES
entities.description: Physical structures designed to reduce soil erosion and conserve water

entities.name: DEGRADED LANDS
entities.description: Lands that have suffered a decline in biological or economic productivity

entities.name: TROPICS
entities.description: The region of the Earth surrounding the equator

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient available water resources to meet demands

entities.name: SOIL AGGREGATE STABILITY
entities.description: The ability of soil aggregates to resist disintegration when exposed to external forces

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: The carbon component of soil organic matter

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL ACTIVITIES
entities.description: The sum of all biological processes occurring in the soil

entities.name: EMBLICA OFFICINALIS
entities.description: A tree species used in the conservation combination

entities.name: CENCHRUS CILIARIS
entities.description: A grass species used in the conservation combination

entities.name: STYLOSANTHES SEABRANA
entities.description: A legume species used in the conservation combination

entities.name: STAGGERED CONTOUR TRENCHES
entities.description: A soil water storage measure involving trenches dug along contours in a staggered pattern

entities.name: CONTINUOUS CONTOUR TRENCHES
entities.description: A soil water storage measure involving continuous trenches dug along contours

entities.name: STONE MULCH
entities.description: A soil conservation practice using a layer of stones to cover the soil surface

entities.name: VEGETATIVE BARRIERS
entities.description: The use of plants to create barriers that reduce soil erosion

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL ACTIVITY INDEX
entities.description: A novel index used to quantify biological activity in soil

entities.name: OXIDATIVE STABILITY
entities.description: A novel index used to measure the stability of soil carbon against oxidation

entities.name: NORMALIZED SOIL STABILITY INDEX
entities.description: A novel index used to quantify soil structural stability

entities.name: LABILE C
entities.description: The fraction of soil organic carbon that is easily decomposable

entities.name: RECALCITRANT C
entities.description: The fraction of soil organic carbon that is resistant to decomposition

entities.name: AGGREGATE ASSOCIATED C
entities.description: Soil organic carbon that is physically protected within soil aggregates

entities.name: FRUIT YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of fruit produced per unit area

entities.name: PASTURE YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of pasture biomass produced per unit area

entities.name: SYSTEM WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of water use in the agricultural system

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall
